title: Figure 11 in Middle Miocene Chalicotheriinae (Mammalia, Perissodactyla) from France, with a discussion on chalicotheriine phylogeny
author: Anquetin, Jérémy
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 11. Phylogeny after the inclusion of Kalimantsia Geraads et al., 2001 in the analysis. Strict consensus of the 98 most parsimonious trees (MPTs: 62 steps; CI = 0.871; RI = 0.877) (strict consensus: 68 steps; CI = 0.794; RI = 0.785).
steps_raw: Figure 11. Phylogeny after the inclusion of Kalimantsia Geraads et al., 2001 in the analysis. Strict consensus of the 98 most parsimonious trees (MPTs: 62 steps; CI = 0.871; RI = 0.877) (strict consensus: 68 steps; CI = 0.794; RI = 0.785).
